$comment: The game's own keyboard bindings, for the informational key-conflict warnings (docs/mcm-design.md §9). Starfield ships no controlmap data file — the defaults live in the executable — so this table is CURATED from the game's documented PC controls and is deliberately editable: fix drift after a game patch, or add/remove rows to taste. `key` is an OSF UI key name (F1-F24, letters/digits, Space/Tab/LShift/LCtrl/LAlt/Grave, ...). `event` is the engine controlmap event id, used ONLY to match rebinds in the controlmap override files the engine honors (Data/Interface/Controls/PC/ControlMap.txt, Documents/My Games/Starfield/ControlMap_Custom.txt) — a wrong event id just means that row ignores rebinds; the default still warns. Purely informational: OSF UI never blocks a colliding bind. Gameplay-context bindings only — menu-context keys (Enter, arrows, ...) would drown mod hotkeys in noise.
